campaigns.hint: The tables, parties, and worlds you play in.
campaigns.atCap: Campaign limit reached ({{max}}). Delete one to add another.
campaigns.emptyBlurb: Create a campaign to play with your party, or join an existing one with an invite link.
campaigns.createBlurb: Start a shared table. You’ll get an invite link to share with your players.
campaigns.createError: Could not create the campaign. Please try again.
campaigns.createdBlurb: Share the invite link with your players so they can join.
campaigns.joinBlurb: Paste the invite link your Dungeon Master shared with you.
campaigns.joinInviteHint: Paste the whole invite link your DM shared.
campaigns.joinError: That invite link didn’t work. Check it and try again.
campaigns.inviteLinkHint: Anyone with this link can join your campaign: share it with your party.
campaigns.shareText: Join my D&D campaign “{{name}}” on d20 Folio:

joinLink.invalidBlurb: The campaign may have been deleted, or the link may be mistyped. Ask your DM for a fresh invite link.
